title: Relic Restore
hook: Restore lost treasures to their glory
hook_ru: Верни забытым сокровищам их былой блеск
idea: Multi-stage antique restoration ASMR. Each round a filthy/rusted/tarnished relic arrives; the player walks it through sequential drag-driven TOOL STAGES (brush off dust, scrub grime via a pixel-erase mask, de-rust with a fizz, polish to a mirror shine, finish-detail on rarities), then a before/after reveal appraises it for coins. Coins unlock rarer, dirtier, more valuable relics and better tools. The distinct hook vs our existing cleaning games (power-wash 103, peel 107, scrub-floor 114) is MULTI-STAGE tool-switching + a value/appraisal economy + a relic collection.
origin: Manual 2-game batch 2026-06-05 (slug 133). Restoration/ASMR is a proven cozy Yandex niche; the multi-stage tool ladder + appraisal economy differentiates it from single-surface cleaners.
differentiation: Not a single-surface power-wash, peel, or floor-scrub. The hook is sequential tool-switching restoration (brush->scrub->de-rust->polish->finish) plus a coin appraisal economy and an escalating relic collection.
